title: 突发: 关于近期痛失在敌后根据地英勇工作的同志两位
meta_description: 突发: 关于近期痛失在敌后根据地英勇工作的同志两位 - 两名来自东太平洋家利福特区 潜伏在美帝海军基地服役的美籍种花儿女于近日不幸被敌人抓获 (据称 收获的酬劳分别为$5000左右和$14000)   https://abcnews.go.com/US/2-us-navy-sailors-arrested-al...
meta_keywords: 突发,近期,痛失,敌后,根据地,英勇,工作,同志,两位
contents:
两名来自东太平洋家利福特区 潜伏在美帝海军基地服役的美籍种花儿女于近日不幸被敌人抓获 (据称 收获的酬劳分别为$5000左右和$14000)
 
https://abcnews.go.com/US/2-us-navy-sailors-arrested-allegedly-spying-china/story?id=101990144
https://apnews.com/article/espionage-us-navy-arrests-national-security-china-b81514864f8cab253b4d29caa3594a72
https://timesofsandiego.com/military/2023/08/03/san-diego-sailor-jinchao-wei-22-arrested-for-allegedly-selling-defense-information-to-china/

Two U.S. Navy sailors have been arrested on charges related to allegedly spying for China, federal prosecutors announced on Thursday.

Jinchao "Patrick" Wei, a 22-year-old petty officer 2nd class, was arrested Wednesday and charged with espionage. Wei served as a machinist's mate aboard the amphibious ship USS Essex, which is currently receiving maintenance at Naval Base San Diego - 在两栖攻击舰埃塞克斯号上担任机械师, 具有安全通行证, 可接触到保密资料和信息.

Petty Officer Wenheng Zhao, of Monterey Park, California, was also arrested Wednesday, by FBI and NCIS agents, and is charged with conspiracy and receipt of a bribe by a public official. Zhao, 26, worked at the Naval Base Ventura County in Port Hueneme and had an active U.S. security clearance who had access to classified information - 在洛杉矶附近的文图拉县海军基地工作.

According to officials, Wei and Zhao are alleged to have each worked with Chinese intelligence officers to whom they passed along sensitive information related to the technologies they worked with and about upcoming Navy operations, including international military exercises.

---白区根据地建设条例指导思想---
"让种花儿女去白区 多去 快去 飞着去 游着去 走着去 去敌后建立根据地 繁衍壮大 以点带面. 无论他们过去的背景 以后都可以发展成为咱们的人."
